scripts.build: javascript-obfuscator game.js --output game.min.js --compact true --control-flow-flattening true --control-flow-flattening-threshold 0.5 --dead-code-injection true --dead-code-injection-threshold 0.3 --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64 --string-array-threshold 0.5 --transform-object-keys true
